steps.title: Identify the angle relationship
steps.content: Lines $r$ and $s$ are parallel, and line $t$ is a transversal. The angle labeled $x^\circ$ is in the same relative position as the $107^\circ$ angle on the other parallel line.

steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content:
Corresponding angles formed by a transversal crossing parallel lines are equal. Because the two angles are corresponding, their measures are the same.
$$x=107$$

steps.title: Match the angle value
steps.content: The value of $x$ is $107$. It is not $73$, because $73^\circ$ is the supplement of $107^\circ$, and it is not $90$ or $180$. The answer is D.
